pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Firmware updater for the Dell U4025QW ultrawide monitor. Updates the monitor's internal firmware including the Thunderbolt controller, USB hub, MCU, and display scaler.
The M3T105 firmware fixes Thunderbolt suspend/resume behavior (auto-switching to DP/HDMI on sleep) and USB hub signal stability.
Requires a USB upstream cable connection to the monitor.
